beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: TMATH 351 or TMATH 450

requirementGroup.label: TMATH 351 or TMATH 450
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: To prepare to enroll in TMATH 450, the Capstone project should be started no later than the summer before 450 is to be taken. The Capstone experience culminates in a paper, which is used as a basis for enrollment in TMATH 450 in Winter quarter. The paper must be 75 percent complete to be considered for enrollment in TMATH 450, which is required for graduation. Students in TMATH 450 must earn marks at or above 1.5, and must co-enroll in TMATH 351 .
